channel.title: Dimension 20 Animated
channel.description: Latest releases from Dimension 20 Animated on Dropout.tv

item.title: Handy Andi CEO Crashes Out
item.description:
The CEO of the Handy Andi holds a meeting about the new Sundry Sidney commercial. Animated by Trevor Dedekind and Alex Dron.

Duration: 03:49

Tags: Dimension 20 Animated, Dimension 20, A Starstruck Odyssey, animation, role playing, space, business, commercials, robots, brennan lee mulligan, emily axford, yukfoo animation, trevor dedekind, alex dron

item.title: Barry Syx Confronts Barry Nyne
item.description:
Barry Syx and Barry Nyne argue about who's the real Barry Syx. Animated by Alex Barry-Dron and Trevor Dedekind.

Duration: 02:30

Tags: Dimension 20 Animated, Dimension 20, A Starstruck Odyssey, animation, role playing, fantasy, space, brian murphy, brennan lee mulligan, emily axford, yukfoo animation, trevor dedekind, alex dron
